Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
234 
LINE_SRVC_CNT 
LABEL: 
Line Service Count 
DESCRIPTION: The count of the total number of services processed for the line item on the non-institutional claim. 
SHORT NAME: SRVC_CNT 
LONG NAME: LINE_SRVC_CNT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field may have decimals (it is formatted as SAS length 11.3).
